deploymentSecretStore.note: Only names/status are recorded. Required production trust secrets are not present in the active local audit environment.

blockers.providerOrSystem: Direct Democracy identity email adapter; concrete production adapter currently Resend
blockers.validationNotRun: Worker-backed provider email acceptance via npm run email:production-test -- --recipient=<authorized> --confirm-production-send
blockers.nextAction: Configure verified sender/domain, provider API credential, and an authorized audit recipient; rerun email:production-test and email:audit.

blockers.providerOrSystem: Private production-capable object storage behind lib/identity/evidence-storage.ts
blockers.validationNotRun: Durable private storage upload/read/hash/namespace/delete smoke test; current smoke refused because storage is unconfigured.
blockers.nextAction: Configure the intended private storage provider and ensure evidence:smoke-test exercises the real durable adapter rather than local development storage.

blockers.validationNotRun: Durable encrypted create/read/update/expire/revoke smoke test; current smoke refused because storage is unconfigured.
blockers.nextAction: Configure the intended private storage backend and ensure browser-sessions:smoke-test exercises durable storage with no raw cookie/token artifact leakage.

blockers.validationNotRun: Real provider-backed backup with sanitized backup identifier, timestamps, encryption status, and integrity evidence.
blockers.nextAction: Configure and run the approved provider backup mechanism; do not substitute schema export or documentation-only evidence.

blockers.validationNotRun: Restore backup into isolated temporary DB/schema, validate schema and representative identity/admin-operation counts, then remove or retain per policy.
blockers.nextAction: Provision isolated restore target and real backup artifact; run restore smoke test without touching production database.

services.selectedBackend: Existing provider-neutral identity email adapter; Resend is the only concrete production adapter currently implemented.
Existing identity evidence storage boundary with encrypted local-development storage and production private object-storage configuration gate.
Existing admin operations browser-session storage boundary with separate Playwright session key namespace.
GitHub Actions durable worker plus local operator worker
Database-provider native backup/restore first; encrypted private-storage fallback only if provider-native backup is unavailable.
Existing officials source registry, network retrieval, verification, reconciliation, guarded promotion, and coverage audit.
